---
title: "Reminding myself how to use Quarto to build this website"
author: "Martin Wood"
date: "2026-05-26"
categories: [tutorial]
image: "https://quarto.org/quarto.png"
---

# Because I keep forgetting or moving machine

## Guidance links

Need these links for setting up.

Download and install, then follow the Github Pages guidance for option 2:
making use of quarto's `quarto publish` command to push rendered websites up
from the command line.

[Download Quarto](https://quarto.org/docs/download/index.html)

[Quarto (blog) setup guidance](https://quarto.org/docs/websites/website-blog.html)

[Github pages guidance](https://quarto.org/docs/publishing/github-pages.html)

## Before publishing
```bash
quarto preview
```

Renders the website and serves it up locally so you can see what you just created 

## To render and publish up once ready
```bash
quarto render
quarto publish
```
